title: Disable local (key-based) auth on the AI account
detection_signal: account.disable_local_auth == true

title: Use managed identity for the AI account
detection_signal: account.identity.type in {SystemAssigned, UserAssigned}

title: Diagnostic settings forward logs to a workspace
detection_signal: account has at least one diagnostic setting with a workspace_id

title: Content-safety evaluator flagged a row in the latest eval
detection_signal: row metric >= severity_floor on Violence/SelfHarm/Sexual/HateUnfairness

title: Content-filter triggers detected in production
detection_signal: KQL hits on gen_ai.response.finish_reasons contains content_filter

title: Continuous evaluation rules attached to agents
detection_signal: foundry.evaluation_rules is empty while agents exist

title: Continuous evaluation rules enabled
detection_signal: any evaluation_rule.enabled == false

title: Agent target is pinned to a version
detection_signal: agentops.yaml agent: lacks :version (or :latest)

title: agentops.yaml declares explicit thresholds
detection_signal: agentops.yaml has no thresholds: block

title: Repository has an AgentOps PR gate
detection_signal: .github/workflows/agentops-pr.yml exists

title: Repository has AgentOps deploy workflows
detection_signal: at least one .github/workflows/agentops-deploy-*.yml exists

title: Eval results are not committed to git
detection_signal: .agentops/results/ entry in any reachable .gitignore

title: Dataset YAML files declare a version
detection_signal: .agentops/datasets/*.yaml has a top-level version: field

title: Evaluations are run regularly
detection_signal: latest run timestamp older than stale_after_days

title: No regression in evaluation metrics
detection_signal: latest_metric - baseline_metric > threshold_drop

title: p95 and eval-average latency under threshold
detection_signal: p95_seconds > p95_threshold_seconds or avg_latency > threshold

title: Production error rate under threshold
detection_signal: error_rate > rate_threshold

title: Foundry agent runs not failing
detection_signal: foundry.failure_rate > rate_threshold

title: Production telemetry is wired to the agent
detection_signal: monitor.status == ok and request_count == 0 over lookback

title: Bundle YAML files declare a version
detection_signal: .agentops/bundles/*.yaml has a top-level version: field

title: Eval results directory has an archival policy
detection_signal: .agentops/results/ holds <= 50 run folders

title: Eval metrics are stable across runs
detection_signal: coefficient of variation across last N runs < flaky_cv_threshold

title: AgentOps workflows declare a concurrency block
detection_signal: agentops-pr.yml / agentops-deploy-*.yml has a top-level concurrency: block

title: AgentOps workflows pin actions by commit SHA
detection_signal: every uses: pins to a 40-char SHA

title: Foundry control plane source is wired
detection_signal: foundry_control.diagnostics.status == ok

title: Agent system prompt declares AI nature and source citation
detection_signal: LLM judges agent instructions for AI-disclosure / source-citation / role-scope

title: Agent system prompt has explicit refusal patterns
detection_signal: LLM judges instructions for refusal guidance across the four harm categories

title: Agent system prompt resists jailbreak / injection trapdoors
detection_signal: LLM scans instructions for override-phrasing / embedded secrets / unbounded role-play

title: Evaluation dataset is free of PII
detection_signal: LLM scans .agentops/data/*.jsonl sample for personal information

title: Evaluation dataset covers diverse cohorts
detection_signal: LLM judges dataset sample for demographic / role / domain / tone skew

title: Bundle covers the evaluators the agent needs
detection_signal: LLM compares bundle YAML against agent description and recommends missing built-ins

title: Spec-driven scaffolding has spec content
detection_signal: detector hint paths present but no spec document found

title: Spec tasks are kept fresh
detection_signal: tasks.md unchecked items older than stale_after_days

title: Completed spec tasks reference paths that exist
detection_signal: checked task references a path missing from the workspace

title: Spec evaluators match bundle evaluators
detection_signal: evaluator mentioned in spec absent from every bundle YAML

title: Spec datasets exist in workspace
detection_signal: dataset mentioned in spec absent from .agentops/datasets or .agentops/data

title: Spec agent id matches run.yaml
detection_signal: spec mentions an agent_id that doesn't match run.yaml target.endpoint.agent_id

title: LLM judge cross-checks spec vs implementation
detection_signal: LLM judge compares spec capabilities to workspace fingerprint
